features.label: Luxurious Design
features.text: Crafted with premium materials and sleek aesthetics for a sophisticated look.

features.label: Advanced Hydrotherapy
features.text: Equipped with powerful bubble jets to provide the ultimate relaxation experience.

features.label: Efficient Heating System
features.text: Utilizes cutting-edge technology to maintain optimal water temperature for extended enjoyment.

features.label: Smart Controls
features.text: Easily manage temperature, jet strength, and lighting with intuitive controls for effortless customization.

features.label: Enhanced Comfort Features
features.text: Includes ergonomic seating, cushioned headrests, and LED lighting to enhance comfort and ambiance.

features.label: Durable Construction
features.text: Built to last with high-quality ecological materials, ensuring years of enjoyment with minimal maintenance: Geopolymers and Cocciopesto.
